'''鈭歡-s-ch''' ('''kagasach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neckband|neckband]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neckband|neckband]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-s-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kagasach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigasach|thigasach]] || [[word:jigasach|jigasach]] || [[word:shigasach|shigasach]] || [[word:kigasach|kigasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugasach|thuthugasach]] || [[word:jujugasach|jujugasach]] || [[word:shushugasach|shushugasach]] || [[word:kukugasach|kukugasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugasach|thugasach]] || [[word:jugasach|jugasach]] || [[word:shugasach|shugasach]] || [[word:kugasach|kugasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugasach|thugasach]] || [[word:jugasach|jugasach]] || [[word:shugasach|shugasach]] || [[word:kugasach|kugasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegasach|thegasach]] || [[word:jegasach|jegasach]] || [[word:shegasach|shegasach]] || [[word:kegasach|kegasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogasach|thothogasach]] || [[word:jojogasach|jojogasach]] || [[word:shoshogasach|shoshogasach]] || [[word:kokogasach|kokogasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogasach|thogasach]] || [[word:jogasach|jogasach]] || [[word:shogasach|shogasach]] || [[word:kogasach|kogasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogasach|thogasach]] || [[word:jogasach|jogasach]] || [[word:shogasach|shogasach]] || [[word:kogasach|kogasach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]] || [[word:gasach|gasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gasach|th忙gasach]] || [[word:j忙gasach|j忙gasach]] || [[word:sh忙gasach|sh忙gasach]] || [[word:k忙gasach|k忙gasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagasach|thathagasach]] || [[word:jajagasach|jajagasach]] || [[word:shashagasach|shashagasach]] || [[word:kakagasach|kakagasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagasach|thagasach]] || [[word:jagasach|jagasach]] || [[word:shagasach|shagasach]] || [[word:kagasach|kagasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagasach|thagasach]] || [[word:jagasach|jagasach]] || [[word:shagasach|shagasach]] || [[word:kagasach|kagasach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagasach|shagasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagasach|goshagasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagasach|gokishagasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagasachn眉|shagasachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagasachnkn眉|goshagasachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasachn眉|gokishagasachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagasachsh毛|shagasachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagasachnksh毛|goshagasachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagasachsh毛|gokishagasachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasachro|shagasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasachnkro|goshagasachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasachro|gokishagasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasachmu|shagasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasachnkmu|goshagasachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasachmu|gokishagasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagasachsher|shagasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagasachnksher|goshagasachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagasachsher|gokishagasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagasachng|shagasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagasachnkng|goshagasachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagasachng|gokishagasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagasachya|shagasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagasachnkya|goshagasachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagasachya|gokishagasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagasachyam|shagasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagasachnkyam|goshagasachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagasachyam|gokishagasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagasachn眉sh毛|shagasachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagasachnkn眉sh毛|goshagasachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagasachn眉sh毛|gokishagasachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasachn眉ro|shagasachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasachnkn眉ro|goshagasachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasachn眉ro|gokishagasachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasachn眉mu|shagasachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasachnkn眉mu|goshagasachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasachn眉mu|gokishagasachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagasachsh毛n眉|shagasachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagasachnksh毛n眉|goshagasachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasachsh毛n眉|gokishagasachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasachsh毛ro|shagasachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasachnksh毛ro|goshagasachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasachsh毛ro|gokishagasachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasachsh毛mu|shagasachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasachnksh毛mu|goshagasachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasachsh毛mu|gokishagasachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagasachron眉|shagasachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagasachnkron眉|goshagasachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasachron眉|gokishagasachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagasachrosh毛|shagasachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagasachnkrosh毛|goshagasachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagasachrosh毛|gokishagasachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasachromu|shagasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasachnkromu|goshagasachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasachromu|gokishagasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagasachmun眉|shagasachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagasachnkmun眉|goshagasachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasachmun眉|gokishagasachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagasachmush毛|shagasachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagasachnkmush毛|goshagasachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagasachmush毛|gokishagasachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasachmuro|shagasachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasachnkmuro|goshagasachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasachmuro|gokishagasachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
